summary: Comprehensive end-to-end test of 8pi Platform v1. 20/20 backend pytest cases pass covering health, engagement lifecycle + RoE immutability, SEC-04 audit chain verify, SEC-02 scope enforcement + FR-TOOL-07 (451 licensed), Model Gateway BYOM (hosted Claude, sensitive->local, openmythos 501, redaction), sensing/threat/vuln loop close, agent registry + FR-AGENT-02 (dev cannot run) + FR-AGENT-04 (promote requires sandbox pass), offensive run + approval RBAC (403 non-approver, 200 approver), SEC-10 kill switch (halt->423->resume), and reporting (JSON/HTML/PDF). Frontend flows verified via Playwright: Dashboard shows stat cards, 4 engagement cards (incl. Dogfood active + Acme draft), 6 SEC safety badges, and risk severity bar; navigating to engagement shows all 9 tabs (Overview/RoE/Assets/Threat Map/Console/Findings/Vuln Loop/Audit/Report); threat-map-svg testid renders; Console has run-sensing-btn/run-vulnscan-btn/run-agent-btn + Approval Gate with 3 pending exploit approvals; approve-<id> buttons are disabled for operator role and become enabled after role-switcher -> role-approver; kill-switch-btn opens a modal with kill-confirm-input and kill-confirm-btn; Model Gateway page shows 3 route cards and Test Inference returned 'PONG' via hosted-frontier (real Claude via hosted LLM key).
critical_code_review_comments: orchestration.py activate_core: unused variables `check` and `_parse_dt` import — dead code, remove.
tool_service.py execute_tool: rate limit `RATE_LIMIT`/`recent` variables computed but never enforced — either enforce FR-TOOL-03 or delete the dead code.
orchestration.py execute_tool: `check['reason'].startswith('target_')` may throw if reason is None on rare allow-refusals; add null guard.
React Router v6->v7 future flag warnings in console (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) — non-blocking but should be addressed.
test_credentials: None — no auth in v1; role-switcher used for RBAC.
seed_data_creation: Test engagements TEST_lifecycle and TEST_kill were created; TEST_agent added to registry. These do not disturb seeded Dogfood/Acme engagements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 20 backend pytest cases and all frontend flows described in the request pass on iteration 1. If retesting, resume TEST_kill engagement or ignore (halted). Hosted LLM key works for hosted-frontier route.
